race.comment: SHINDY (8) wound up strongly to finish second, beaten under a length last time out over this track and trip. Has been knocking on the door for a long time and gets another good chance to finally break through. ROCKIN' DEE FOX (2) came home strongly last start to finish a narrow third also at a big price last fortnight. If he holds his form he's right in the mix. THE LADY VENUS (10) progressed nicely last start to finish a close second over the mile here after missing the placings at the previous appearance. Is on the up and deserves her chance. FOX PERIL (1) is knocking on the door and is also in the mix,
